name: citera
description: Personal, offline-capable research paper library for Cloudflare

scripts.dev:api:e2e: cd workers/api/../.. && pnpm exec wrangler dev --env="" --config wrangler.jsonc --env-file tests/e2e/wrangler.env --persist-to .wrangler/e2e-state --port 8787
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @citera/web build && pnpm db:migrate:e2e && playwright test
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply citera-db --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:e2e: wrangler d1 migrations apply citera-db --local --persist-to .wrangler/e2e-state --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply citera-db --remote --env production --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute citera-db --local --config wrangler.jsonc --file seeds/development.sql
scripts.deploy: pnpm deploy:check && pnpm build && wrangler deploy --env production --config wrangler.jsonc && pnpm --filter @citera/jobs deploy:production
